title: Queer Boardgames + Videogames @ Four Quarters
location: Four Quarters, 20 Ash Ave London SE17 1AZ, Greater London
description:
🎮 *What’s the vibe?*

A relaxed, social night built around games — but really, it’s all about meeting people and having a good time.
The games are easy, casual, and low-pressure (nothing too serious), so come along even if you just want to chat and soak up the atmosphere.
This event is open to everyone under the LGBTQIA+ umbrella and allies 🏳️‍🌈
Expect a fun mix of board games, video games, and arcade machines.

🎲 *Board Games*

We’ve got a selection of fun, easy-to-learn board and card games ready to go.
Feel free to bring your own favourites along too!

🕹️ *Video Games*

We bring consoles loaded with classic multiplayer games — think Mario Kart, Tekken, Smash Bros and more.

✨ **How to attend**

From 6:30pm, just arrive and grab a name tag from the table (self-service).
There’ll be a host around — often just me running things — so if you’re new or unsure, come say hi and I’ll happily introduce you to people.

🎉 *How it works*
Find a spot, join a game, and get involved — it’s that simple.
All games have instructions, so no stress if you’ve never played before.
Drinks and arcade tokens are available at the bar.
All video games in our area are free to play.

📍 *Location*
Four Quarters Elephant Park
20 Ash Ave, London SE17 1GQ

⏰ Time
6:30pm onwards (venue closes at 11pm)

🍔 Food
The venue doesn’t serve food, but you’re welcome to bring your own or order in.

💛 How to be a great gaymer
• See someone on their own? Invite them to join
• Notice someone new? Bring them into the conversation
• Be respectful of the games — we’re donation-run, so please return everything as you found it

📲 Stay connected
Please RSVP if you’re coming and join our WhatsApp group:

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

If the link doesn’t work, drop Mark a message or leave a comment.

💸 Donations
All events are free, but there are real costs behind running the group.
If you can, please consider making a yearly donation to help keep things going and growing.
Name: Mark Geer
Account number: 03450947
Sort code: 04-00-04
Reference: donate
Thank you so much for your support 🙏

title: Crowns 👑 The Pop Queens Night! 💃  @ Betty & Joan's Elephant Park
location: Betty & Jones, 9 Hewson Wy, Elephant Park, London SE17 1JS,, London
description:
Join us for this exciting new and exclusive night.
Reserved area and our own DJ for a night of good vibes and pop music.
Please register for your free RSVP ticket on OutSavvy, link below:

Claim your free ticket here: **[Ticket Link](https://link.outsavvy.com/zcbf57i7)**

**The Lineup**

**9pm - 10pm** The social begins where a host will be present to great you if you are new.

**9pm onwards** \- Our very own **DJ Stuart** will begin his set. **Crowns 👑 The Pop Queens Night! 💃**
Details from OutSavvy-
Hey Diva! Get ready to sparkle and sing along at Crowns - The Pop Queens Night where it's Just Pop Queens on Max Volume 💃
🎵 When you say? Friday 13th Feb, 9:00pm till late, but don't arrive too late babe, last entry is midnight. Where? At the fabulous Betty and Joan's in Elephant & Castle! So get ready for a night of all-out pop royalty. Whether you’re channelling your inner Madonna, feeling your Beyoncé power, or living for every Taylor era, we’ve got the girly pop hits to keep you moving. 🎵

Expect to hear music from these pop queens (and many more!):
👑 Ariana Grande 👑 Avril Lavine 👑 Beyoncé 👑 Billie Eilish👑 Britney 👑 Chappell Roan 👑 Charli xcx 👑 Christina Aguilera 👑 Doja Cat 👑 Dua Lipa 👑 Florence 👑 Kesha 👑 Kylie 👑 Lady Gaga 👑 Lily Allen 👑 Lizzo 👑 Lorde 👑 Madonna 👑 Marina 👑 Miley 👑 Nicki 👑 Olivia Rodrigo 👑 Pink👑 Rihanna 👑 Sabrina Carpenter 👑 Sia 👑 SZA 👑 Taylor Swift 👑 Wet Leg 👑 and more…

**Where?**
Betty & Joans
9 Hewson Wy, Elephant Park, London SE17 1JS

**Whatsapp**
Join our whatsapp for event updates (we wont be checking meetup during events).

title: SE LONDON Dog Social - Doggo + Hooman Social Event
location: Faber Fox Pub, 25 Westow Hill, Crystal Palace, SE191TQ,, London
description:
**Hey everyone and welcome to the best new doggo & hooman social event in South London**

*The Vibe*

This is a social event to build friendships & allow dogs to socialise.

This welcome dog owners & non dog owners.

(Inclusive event(

The aim to have an inclusive event which welcomes all Genders, cultures & ages within the minimum ages requirement. this is not an exclusively LGBTQ+ event. this particular event is inclusive to everyone.

*This is a adult social event so it is only 18+ plus. No children sorry.*

*No breed bias*

Inclusion doesn't just apply to hoomans! There is no breed bias.

The main thing everyone needs to think about is....."does my dog suit this environment?"

The event includes outside space which is very good to avoid dogs being overwhelmed.

Dogs with reactivity generally aren't suitable.

(Feel free to dm me to discuss this though or anything relating to the event)

**Event coordination**

Please join our whatsapp for event updates.

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

**Community**

We are a community so we do not charge for events. We ask for yearly donations to aid in paying event fees such as meetup subscription and the on going maintenance and improvement of events.

Name: Mark Geer
Account number: 03450947
Sort code: 04-00-04

title: 🎭 LGBTQ+ Theatre Night – Some Masterchef Sh*t 🎭 (Ticketed)
location: The Glitch, 134Lower Marsh, London SE1 7AE, London
description:
🎭 LGBTQ+ Theatre Night – Some Masterchef Sh*t 🎭

You are required to purchase your own ticket but we have an exclusive booking code for discount (ADAM20) which is case sensitive.

[Tickets](https://www.tickettailor.com/events/vaultcreativearts/2159061)

Join us for a night at the theatre as we check out Some Masterchef Sht* — a dark comedy that blends queer storytelling, uncomfortable laughs, and one of the most shocking true crime inspirations in modern memory.

Two men meet after only speaking online. Coffee is ordered. Small talk flows. The tension builds.

Is it a date?
A hook-up?
An interview?

Not quite.

Using a queer lens to reimagine one of the most infamous crimes in recent history, Some Masterchef Sht *explores loneliness, connection, mental health, people-pleasing, and how far someone might go in the name of “doing something nice”.

Expect:
✨ Dark comedy
🌈 Queer storytelling
😳 Taboo topics handled with humour
🎭 Award-winning writing
☕ Post-show chats (optional!)

Winner of the audience-voted favourite play at OffCut Manchester and following successful runs in Manchester and Edinburgh Fringe, this is the London debut production.

🍻 Pre-social from 6PM
We’ll meet beforehand at Vaulty Towers for drinks and introductions before walking together to the theatre. New people especially welcome — hosts available for intros.

📍 Pre-social: Vaulty Towers
🎭 Show Venue: The Glitch, SE1 7AE
🚶 Short walk from pre-social to venue together
⏰ Please arrive on time so we can head over as a group

As always, this is a social event first — theatre is just the icebreaker.

**Join the whatsapp for updates before and during the event.**

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

title: Friendly Queers & Beers (Plus Karaoke) @ Central Station  (Free Event)
location: Central Station, 37 Wharfdale Road, Kings Cross, London
description:
You're very welcome to a free meetup at Central Station this Friday. We normally sit chatting, drinking and/or having a bite to eat in our private space upstairs, before drifting down into the main bar later in the evening.

It's a great way to meet new people and have some chilled chats and laughs. All LGBTQ+ people and their allies are welcome.

Everybody is equally welcome!

Don't worry if you've not come to an event before: the host will introduce you to everyone and make sure you feel welcomed and included.

Please RSVP if you are attending. Your RSVP encourages others to attend. Their RSVP...etc etc

please join the WhatsApp group for all our events, when you arrive please ask for the host, me Kwashie, and say hi...even if I'm chatting to someone... I can introduce you to some cool people, or newbies etc.
________________________________

We ask that new members that enjoy our events to make a voluntary donation which helps keep the group events running for free.

To send a donations please use the reference "Donation" to the following account

Mark Geer
03450947
04-00-04

Whatsapp invite which we use for events -

https://chat.whatsapp.com/HOKXRrCEnFwFawuQYDbNFO?mode=ac_t

title: Saturday Soho Social @ Rupert Street Soho (Free Event)
location: Rupert Street Bar, 50 Rupert Street, London
description:
We were pleased to welcome so many new faces at last week's great meetup, when people dropped into the Rupert on a casual basis - we are back again with our Saturday soho drinks which are informal and fun.

All LGBTQIA+ people and their allies are welcome. It's social drinks where we meet and see what we feel like doing.

It's all very freestyle.... come for one drink...or the whole evening!

We will start off in Rupert Street at 5pm

Please join the WhatsApp group for up to date info on the day.

https://chat.whatsapp.com/HOKXRrCEnFwFawuQYDbNFO?mode=ac_t

New people are welcome, everyone is friendly and the host will welcome you and introduce you to everyone. Feel free to message me here on meetup or in the chat.

If you are coming, please sign up on Meet-up.....that way I can reserve a table/space at Rupert.

Cheers, Queers!

title: Queer Boardgames + Videogames @ Betty & Joans
location: Betty & Joan’s - The Queer Comedy Club, 9 Hewson Way, London
description:
WHO IS READY FOR GAMES?

(now with added videogames)

*What is the vibe?*

This is a social with games....

The games are all easy to play (nothing too serious) so come along even if you just want to socialise In general.

This is open to *everyone* under the LGBTQIA+ Umbrella and allies.

*Boardgames -*

Giant jenga
Codenames
Uno
Monopoly go
Connect 4
Sushi go
Chamelon
Blokus
Azul
Just one
Exploding kittens

Please bring your own too if you wish.

*Videogames -*

Mario Kart World
Mario Party Jamboree
Overcooked 2
Street fighter 6
Smash Bros Ultimate
Streets of rage 4
Super Mario 3d World
Super Mario Wonder
Wii Sports
Just Dance
TEENAGE MUTANT NINJA TURTLES
Resident evil 5 (Coop)
Retro games - GCN, NES, MEGA DRIVE, N64 AND SNES

*How to attend*

As always if you have meetup please RSVP but if you dont have meetup yet you are free to just turn up.

Checkout this Meetup with LGBTQ+ London: https://meetu.ps/e/NQhq1/CLkL7/i

The event starts from 7pm where there will be a table with nametags which are self service.

A host will be present until 7:30 for Introductions. After this time if you need a host please approach us (we will be playing games/chatting to others)

*The space*

We have a large amount of space so plenty of room for everyone. Videogames/Giant jenga can also be played whilst standing too. Plenty of options

*How the event works*

Hosts are present to welcome people but there are no gamesmasters.

Everyone finds a spot, finds a game and just gets on with it. There are instructions 😀.

*Location*

Betty & Joans
9 Hewson Wy, Elephant Park, London SE17 1JS

*Time*

7pm onwards (Usually finishes 10:30/11pm)

*Food*

Venue does not serve food but you are welcome to bring in food or deliveroo.

*How to be a good gaymer?*

Playing a game and see someone on their own? Invite them

In a conversation and see someone is new? Invite them into the chat

Respectful of games - after playing games please return as you saw them as we are run by donations.

***

Please Rsvp if you plan to come and also join our Whatsapp.

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

If the link does not work please Dm mark or leave a comment.

***

Dont forget we run all events for free but there are many costs to running a meetup and Social group.

Send your yearly donations to the following.

Account number: 03450947
Sort code: 04-00-04

title: Summer Social @ Clapham Common
location: Clapham, Near Clapham Common Tube station, London
description:
☀️🎶 SUMMER SOCIAL 🎶☀️

Summer is here (apparently 😅), so we thought it was time for another social!

On Sunday 12th July we’re taking over Clapham Common for a high-energy Summer Social picnic with banging tunes, social vibes & hopefully some new friendships.

Think:

🎶 Big tunes
🕺 Dancing (maybe?)
🍹 Summer drinks
🌈 Good people
☀️ Sunshine vibes
🤝 Meeting new people
🎲 Social party games
🪵 Giant Jenga & group games
🍽️ Potluck picnic vibes

Whether you come alone or with friends, everyone is welcome. LGBTQ+ friendly and allies welcome too 🌈

📍 Clapham Common, London
🗓 Sunday 12th July
🕐 1PM onwards

Bring along:

🧺 Picnic blanket
🥤 Drinks/snacks
🍽️ Potluck style — bring something along if you’d like to share with new friends
🕶 Sunglasses & sun cream
☀️ Summer energy — good vibes only

Games & Activities

We’ll have Giant Jenga plus some easy social / party games to help break the ice and get people chatting. Feel free to bring games too!

The Location

We’ll post the exact location pin / meeting point closer to the event date. Please everyone join the whatsapp so you dont miss important details.

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

I plan to arrive around 12:40–12:45pm to find a good spot before everyone arrives.

If anyone wants to meet me there early, you’re welcome! Once things get going I’ll try to stay present with people, so if messages get missed please help point others in the right direction ❤️

Toilets / Supplies

There are shops, cafés and facilities around Clapham Common, so grabbing snacks, drinks or emergency supplies shouldn’t be a problem.

Shade / Weather

We’ll find somewhere with shade if needed — no stress about sitting in direct sun all day 🌳

When does it end?

It starts at 1pm… and ends when it ends 😅 No fixed finish time. If the vibes are good, we stay longer.

Look for a larger group with music — we should be easy to spot 🎶

title: Interactive theatre Night - Bury Me Before You Marry Me (Ticketed)
location: The Cockpit, The Cockpit, Gateforth Street London, NW8 8EH, London
description:
🎭 **Interactive Theatre Night – Bury Me, Marry Me**

Join us for a unique and immersive theatre experience where you’re not just watching the story… you’re part of it 👀

This is a ticketed event, so please purchase your own ticket in advance:

[Ticket link](https://burymemarryme.susuproductions.co.uk/?fbclid=PAT01DUARjUv9leHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA81NjcwNjczNDMzNTI0MjcAAadLrDGuYh80H_Gy_oEJDg0xPA6sh7cXiK8VaufnKKQ7IkZcT5exMJkJCnYWgA_aem_5BoQo-Ohna3kk3mKDFq8jg)

You can purchase any ticket you desire because the only difference is the interactions of the show.

👀 **What to Expect**

In some parts of Asia, there’s a belief…
When a young man dies unmarried, his family may arrange a ghost wedding to accompany him into the afterlife.
Sometimes the bride is already dead.
Sometimes… she isn’t.
When Jason discovers his girlfriend may be involved in one of these rituals, things take a dark and unexpected turn.

This is a dark comedy, interactive theatre experience where:
✨ You’ll interact with the characters
✨ Your choices shape the story
✨ Every performance has a different ending
This isn’t just a show… it’s a ritual. And the outcome is in your hands.

📍 **When & Where**
Thursday 30th July
🕕 Meet at 6PM at the theayre(social before the show)
🎭 Show starts at 7PM

**Event coordination **

Join our whatsapp for updates during and before the event.

[Whatsapp Link](https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S)

🌈 About the Group
LGBTQ+ London is an inclusive community open to everyone — whether you’re here to meet people, try new experiences, or just have a good time 💛

💛 Community Support
This group is powered by the community
Donations help us cover costs and keep everything running.
If you can, we suggest chucking in a yearly donation to help us keep growing and putting on great events. No pressure though — anything helps!
Appreciate you all 🙌

[Donation Link](https://monzo.me/markgeer?h=zJmhoa)

Name: Mark Geer
Account number: 03450947
Sort code: 04-00-04

We will start off in Rupert Street at 5pm

Please join the WhatsApp group for up to date info on the day.

https://chat.whatsapp.com/HOKXRrCEnFwFawuQYDbNFO?mode=ac_t

New people are welcome, everyone is friendly and the host will welcome you and introduce you to everyone. Feel free to message me here on meetup or in the chat.

If you are coming, please sign up on Meet-up.....that way I can reserve a table/space at Rupert.

Cheers, Queers!

title: Queer Boardgames + Videogames @ Betty & Joans
location: Betty & Joan’s - The Queer Comedy Club, 9 Hewson Way, London
description:
WHO IS READY FOR GAMES?

(now with added videogames)

*What is the vibe?*

This is a social with games....

The games are all easy to play (nothing too serious) so come along even if you just want to socialise In general.

This is open to *everyone* under the LGBTQIA+ Umbrella and allies.

*Boardgames -*

Giant jenga
Codenames
Uno
Monopoly go
Connect 4
Sushi go
Chamelon
Blokus
Azul
Just one
Exploding kittens

Please bring your own too if you wish.

*Videogames -*

Mario Kart World
Mario Party Jamboree
Overcooked 2
Street fighter 6
Smash Bros Ultimate
Streets of rage 4
Super Mario 3d World
Super Mario Wonder
Wii Sports
Just Dance
TEENAGE MUTANT NINJA TURTLES
Resident evil 5 (Coop)
Retro games - GCN, NES, MEGA DRIVE, N64 AND SNES

*How to attend*

As always if you have meetup please RSVP but if you dont have meetup yet you are free to just turn up.

Checkout this Meetup with LGBTQ+ London: https://meetu.ps/e/NQhq1/CLkL7/i

The event starts from 7pm where there will be a table with nametags which are self service.

A host will be present until 7:30 for Introductions. After this time if you need a host please approach us (we will be playing games/chatting to others)

*The space*

We have a large amount of space so plenty of room for everyone. Videogames/Giant jenga can also be played whilst standing too. Plenty of options

*How the event works*

Hosts are present to welcome people but there are no gamesmasters.

Everyone finds a spot, finds a game and just gets on with it. There are instructions 😀.

*Location*

Betty & Joans
9 Hewson Wy, Elephant Park, London SE17 1JS

*Time*

7pm onwards (Usually finishes 10:30/11pm)

*Food*

Venue does not serve food but you are welcome to bring in food or deliveroo.

*How to be a good gaymer?*

Playing a game and see someone on their own? Invite them

In a conversation and see someone is new? Invite them into the chat

Respectful of games - after playing games please return as you saw them as we are run by donations.

_____________________________

Please Rsvp if you plan to come and also join our Whatsapp.

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

If the link does not work please Dm mark or leave a comment.

__________________________________

Dont forget we run all events for free but there are many costs to running a meetup and Social group.

Send your yearly donations to the following.

Name: Mark Geer
Account number: 03450947
Sort code: 04-00-04

Reference- donate

thanks a lot

title: Queer Travel - Cologne 2026
location: London
description:
Are you a Gaymer? or a travel lover?

Why not join the community for a trip to Cologne, Germany. This is a relaxed flexible trip where you can join us for as much activities as you so choose.

The main reason is to attend Gamescom 2026 but not everyone is attending the largest games expo in the world!

There will be plenty of time to explore the city and enjoy meals/drinks.

[Itinerary](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1NSab8qjzbOl6o8Kw0hiVRnZHbuHNaUPL/view?usp=drivesdk)

Message Mark on 07972906600 for more info or to confirm bookings. we have a whatsapp for confirmed attendees.

Gamescom season is very popular so book your hotels as soon as you can.

title: Friendly Queers & Beers (Plus Karaoke) @ Central Station  (Free Event)
location: Central Station, 37 Wharfdale Road, Kings Cross, London
description:
You're very welcome to a free meetup at Central Station this Friday. We normally sit chatting, drinking and/or having a bite to eat in our private space upstairs, before drifting down into the main bar later in the evening.

It's a great way to meet new people and have some chilled chats and laughs. All LGBTQ+ people and their allies are welcome.

Everybody is equally welcome!

Don't worry if you've not come to an event before: the host will introduce you to everyone and make sure you feel welcomed and included.

Please RSVP if you are attending. Your RSVP encourages others to attend. Their RSVP...etc etc

please join the WhatsApp group for all our events, when you arrive please ask for the host, me Kwashie, and say hi...even if I'm chatting to someone... I can introduce you to some cool people, or newbies etc.
________________________________

We ask that new members that enjoy our events to make a voluntary donation which helps keep the group events running for free.

To send a donations please use the reference "Donation" to the following account

Mark Geer
03450947
04-00-04

https://chat.whatsapp.com/HOKXRrCEnFwFawuQYDbNFO?mode=ac_t

title: Queer Boardgames + Videogames @ Four Quarters
location: Four Quarters, 20 Ash Ave London SE17 1AZ, Greater London
description:
🎮 *What’s the vibe?*

A relaxed, social night built around games — but really, it’s all about meeting people and having a good time.
The games are easy, casual, and low-pressure (nothing too serious), so come along even if you just want to chat and soak up the atmosphere.
This event is open to everyone under the LGBTQIA+ umbrella and allies 🏳️‍🌈
Expect a fun mix of board games, video games, and arcade machines.

🎲 *Board Games*

We’ve got a selection of fun, easy-to-learn board and card games ready to go.
Feel free to bring your own favourites along too!

🕹️ *Video Games*

We bring consoles loaded with classic multiplayer games — think Mario Kart, Tekken, Smash Bros and more.

✨ **How to attend**

From 6:30pm, just arrive and grab a name tag from the table (self-service).
There’ll be a host around — often just me running things — so if you’re new or unsure, come say hi and I’ll happily introduce you to people.

🎉 *How it works*
Find a spot, join a game, and get involved — it’s that simple.
All games have instructions, so no stress if you’ve never played before.
Drinks and arcade tokens are available at the bar.
All video games in our area are free to play.

📍 *Location*
Four Quarters Elephant Park
20 Ash Ave, London SE17 1GQ

⏰ Time
6:30pm onwards (venue closes at 11pm)

🍔 Food
The venue doesn’t serve food, but you’re welcome to bring your own or order in.

💛 How to be a great gaymer
• See someone on their own? Invite them to join
• Notice someone new? Bring them into the conversation
• Be respectful of the games — we’re donation-run, so please return everything as you found it

📲 Stay connected
Please RSVP if you’re coming and join our WhatsApp group:

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

If the link doesn’t work, drop Mark a message or leave a comment.

💸 Donations
All events are free, but there are real costs behind running the group.
If you can, please consider making a yearly donation to help keep things going and growing.
Name: Mark Geer
Account number: 03450947
Sort code: 04-00-04
Reference: donate
Thank you so much for your support 🙏

location: Rupert Street Bar, 50 Rupert Street, London
description:

title: Queer Boardgames + Videogames @ Four Quarters
location: Four Quarters, 20 Ash Ave London SE17 1AZ, Greater London
description:
🎮 *What’s the vibe?*

A relaxed, social night built around games — but really, it’s all about meeting people and having a good time.
The games are easy, casual, and low-pressure (nothing too serious), so come along even if you just want to chat and soak up the atmosphere.
This event is open to everyone under the LGBTQIA+ umbrella and allies 🏳️‍🌈
Expect a fun mix of board games, video games, and arcade machines.

🎲 *Board Games*

We’ve got a selection of fun, easy-to-learn board and card games ready to go.
Feel free to bring your own favourites along too!

🕹️ *Video Games*

We bring consoles loaded with classic multiplayer games — think Mario Kart, Tekken, Smash Bros and more.

✨ **How to attend**

From 6:30pm, just arrive and grab a name tag from the table (self-service).
There’ll be a host around — often just me running things — so if you’re new or unsure, come say hi and I’ll happily introduce you to people.

🎉 *How it works*
Find a spot, join a game, and get involved — it’s that simple.
All games have instructions, so no stress if you’ve never played before.
Drinks and arcade tokens are available at the bar.
All video games in our area are free to play.

📍 *Location*
Four Quarters Elephant Park
20 Ash Ave, London SE17 1GQ

⏰ Time
6:30pm onwards (venue closes at 11pm)

🍔 Food
The venue doesn’t serve food, but you’re welcome to bring your own or order in.

💛 How to be a great gaymer
• See someone on their own? Invite them to join
• Notice someone new? Bring them into the conversation
• Be respectful of the games — we’re donation-run, so please return everything as you found it

📲 Stay connected
Please RSVP if you’re coming and join our WhatsApp group:

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

If the link doesn’t work, drop Mark a message or leave a comment.

💸 Donations
All events are free, but there are real costs behind running the group.
If you can, please consider making a yearly donation to help keep things going and growing.
Name: Mark Geer
Account number: 03450947
Sort code: 04-00-04
Reference: donate
Thank you so much for your support 🙏

title: Queer Boardgames + Videogames @ Betty & Joans
location: Betty & Joan’s - The Queer Comedy Club, 9 Hewson Way, London
description:
WHO IS READY FOR GAMES?

(now with added videogames)

*What is the vibe?*

This is a social with games....

The games are all easy to play (nothing too serious) so come along even if you just want to socialise In general.

This is open to *everyone* under the LGBTQIA+ Umbrella and allies.

*Boardgames -*

Giant jenga
Codenames
Uno
Monopoly go
Connect 4
Sushi go
Chamelon
Blokus
Azul
Just one
Exploding kittens

Please bring your own too if you wish.

*Videogames -*

Mario Kart World
Mario Party Jamboree
Overcooked 2
Street fighter 6
Smash Bros Ultimate
Streets of rage 4
Super Mario 3d World
Super Mario Wonder
Wii Sports
Just Dance
TEENAGE MUTANT NINJA TURTLES
Resident evil 5 (Coop)
Retro games - GCN, NES, MEGA DRIVE, N64 AND SNES

*How to attend*

As always if you have meetup please RSVP but if you dont have meetup yet you are free to just turn up.

Checkout this Meetup with LGBTQ+ London: https://meetu.ps/e/NQhq1/CLkL7/i

The event starts from 7pm where there will be a table with nametags which are self service.

A host will be present until 7:30 for Introductions. After this time if you need a host please approach us (we will be playing games/chatting to others)

*The space*

We have a large amount of space so plenty of room for everyone. Videogames/Giant jenga can also be played whilst standing too. Plenty of options

*How the event works*

Hosts are present to welcome people but there are no gamesmasters.

Everyone finds a spot, finds a game and just gets on with it. There are instructions 😀.

*Location*

Betty & Joans
9 Hewson Wy, Elephant Park, London SE17 1JS

*Time*

7pm onwards (Usually finishes 10:30/11pm)

*Food*

Venue does not serve food but you are welcome to bring in food or deliveroo.

*How to be a good gaymer?*

Playing a game and see someone on their own? Invite them

In a conversation and see someone is new? Invite them into the chat

Respectful of games - after playing games please return as you saw them as we are run by donations.

_____________________________

Please Rsvp if you plan to come and also join our Whatsapp.

https://chat.whatsapp.com/GYxo1GonGIbIvLlS6CpG8S

If the link does not work please Dm mark or leave a comment.

__________________________________

Dont forget we run all events for free but there are many costs to running a meetup and Social group.

Send your yearly donations to the following.
